items.visual_description: A cylindrical bottle of Cetaphil serum, made of semi-transparent frosted glass revealing a light pink liquid. The bottle has a white label with the 'Cetaphil' logo and product information in blue, green, pink, and black text. It is topped with a dropper applicator that has a shiny, metallic pink collar and a white rubber squeeze bulb.

overall_description: A product image of Cetaphil's Bright Healthy Radiance Perfecting Serum. The 30ml bottle has a clean, clinical aesthetic with a frosted glass body, a white and pink color scheme, and a distinctive metallic pink dropper cap.
